name: Amaan Barmare
tagline: I build full-stack AI products end-to-end.
bio: I'm a Founding Engineer at Oltaflock, where I ship production AI systems across very different surfaces: real-estate transaction intelligence, meeting-intelligence SaaS, warehouse invoicing, and SCADA monitoring on a factory floor.

Before Oltaflock I interned at Mu Sigma as a Data Scientist (Grafana dashboards and supply-chain analytics for a Fortune 500 client) and twice at Augle AI as a Software Engineer, working on computer-vision QC pipelines and structured scraping for downstream AI.
I graduated from Penn State in May 2025 with a BS in Computer Science and a minor in Economics (Dean's List).

I like systems that survive contact with reality: agents with policy gates, webhooks that don't double-fire, transcripts that recover when the service worker dies. If something looks too clean, it's probably hiding a race condition.

education.degree: BS Computer Science, Minor in Economics
